response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, UML architecture modeling, and German language proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this executive-level role focused on client advisory and German-market compliance.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across languages, platforms, and team mentoring
Strong DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience with Docker, GitLab, and deployment systems
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — falls far short of required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML expertise or formal IT architecture design for client systems
Work history is centered in Kenya with no demonstrable experience in German IT consulting or compliance contexts
